title: Property Owners - Elite South Texas
content:
We are a specialty manufacturer of engineered high performance surfaces & flooring. With over 100 technical support offices worldwide that supply thousands of independent contractors, Elite South Texas is here to help you understand and choose the correct flooring system or surface to meet your specific needs. Our systems are specialty engineered for various applications including interior or exterior surfaces, vertical wall coatings, restoration projects and more.
